evidence_label: branch-review packet checker refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia OR transfusion dependent thalassemia) AND (gene therapy OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR monitoring OR iron overload OR transfusion burden) AND (2025:2026[dp])

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_diagnosis
guideline_sources.role: supports diagnosis, genotype, and phenotype as a required private packet domain before branch interpretation

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_transfusion
guideline_sources.role: supports transfusion burden, blood-bank, antibody, reaction, and response context as required private packet domains

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_iron_overload
guideline_sources.role: supports ferritin, liver iron, cardiac T2*, chelation, and organ-risk context before branch review

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_monitoring
guideline_sources.role: supports monitoring discipline before any case-specific branch interpretation

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct
guideline_sources.role: supports keeping allogeneic HCT as a qualified branch-review question with donor, center, and risk context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: supports keeping gene-cell therapy as a separate qualified branch-review question with collection, conditioning, and follow-up context

pubmed_records.title: Best practices in gene therapy for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Exa-cel in children with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia or sickle cell disease.
Experience with stem cell collection for children with transfusion-dependent thalassemia undergoing gene therapy.
Correction of ineffective erythropoiesis and normalization of iron homeostasis after exagamglogene autotemcel in transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Second allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation after graft failure is an effective curative option in children with hemoglobinopathies.
Cost-effectiveness of exagamglogene autotemcel gene-edited therapy in patients with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia in the United States.
Assessment of hepatic fibrosis in Egyptian children and adolescents with beta thalassemia major: a single center study.
Dapagliflozin in patients with homozygous beta-thalassemia and albuminuria.

checker_use: The source refresh supports a label-only private packet checker. It does not support diagnosis, therapy selection, eligibility, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion changes, chelation changes, lab contact, private-message routing, or sample routing.
